production.playableLoop: Move through the dusk orchard, collect eight lantern fruit, avoid drifting shadow hazards, and retry or replay from the win/fail state with Space.
production.objective: Collect 8 of 8 lanterns before the 45 second timer reaches zero.
production.failRetry: Hazard contact or timeout enters a failed state; Space resets player, lanterns, timer, score, and HUD. Winning also allows Space replay.

assetSourcing.playerHero: SQLite catalog searches for character and arcade direct GLB records returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH; authored as a custom low-poly hero with companion halo and hand lantern.
assetSourcing.obstacleEnemy: SQLite catalog searches for arcade direct GLB records returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH; authored as cohesive drifting shadow hazard meshes.
assetSourcing.rewardInteractable: SQLite catalog searches for collectible and arcade direct GLB records returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH; authored as emissive lantern fruit.
assetSourcing.worldEnvironment: SQLite catalog searches for environment and arcade direct GLB records returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH; authored as orchard floor, path, fence, trees, and rocks.
assetSourcing.audioFeedback: Starter local goal-ping audio asset remains available as local fallback provenance; runtime trigger wiring is deferred until audio facade proof is part of this game loop.
